changes.description: v6.9.0 entry lines 24 and 40: '14 credential patterns' → '17 credential patterns' (both sites). Parenthetical pattern list on line 40 extended to name 3 new patterns: lower-case env-var assignments, JSON field values, PGP private-key end marker.
changes.validation: grep -F '14 credential' CHANGELOG.md → 0 matches; grep -F '17 credential' CHANGELOG.md → 2 matches

amendments.change: Added 'asked_at' (ISO 8601 timestamp, written at detection time, read by autopilot for pause-timeout) to clarification object field list. Updated total field count from 6 to 7.

Added explicit increment-exclusivity clause: 'clarifications_consumed is incremented exclusively by skill orchestrators at NEEDS_CLARIFICATION detection time; resume-ticket --clarification MUST NOT re-increment the counter.'

Changed '14-row credential-pattern regex table' to '17-row'. Added 3 new patterns: (15) lower-case env-var assignments → [REDACTED-LOWER-VAR]; (16) JSON field values → [REDACTED-JSON-FIELD]; (17) SSH/PGP private-key END line → [REDACTED-PRIVATE-KEY-END].

changes.validation: grep -F 'asked_at' requirements.md → match under REQ-042; grep -F '(amended v6.9.1)' requirements.md → 3 matches

changes.description: Updated citation count table to match actual grep counts from skills/ and core/ (excluding self-references in snippet files). webhook-curl: 21 → 29 (actual implementation has more sites than spec projected); issue-id-validation: 4 → 5 (core/agent-states.md adds 1 reference). metrics-json-schema, pipeline-completion, architecture-freshness unchanged (1, 3, 2).
changes.validation: grep -F 'webhook-curl | 29' README.md → match; grep -F 'issue-id-validation | 5' README.md → match
